2192740.name: BEAST CRIMES - NEO TOKYO
2192740.description:
New cases set in the future in Neo Tokyo! Are you able to solve crimes regardless the outcome?


EVERLASTING ESCAPE: Seiko and three other orphans are kidnapped to a remote research lab called Hotel Jiyū. They are informed that the only way to be able to leave is to become worthy members of the society. Those who fails the trials that awaits will be eliminate, one by one. . .

NEW FEATURES

  • Ranking system: Track and improve your different skills. How good you are at each will increase or limit the various options to solve the puzzles.
  • Reaper: Your choices decides which persons are going to die and when.
  • Clock: Decied what to do during your mornings, afternoons, evenings and nights.

This DLC contains currently of 1 Case. Two more cases may be added in the future
